title: Darrell Goulding
extract: Darrell Goulding (born 3 March 1988) is an English former professional rugby league footballer. He spent nine years of his career with Wigan Warriors, with whom he won the Super League Grand Final in 2010 and 2013, and also played for Hull Kingston Rovers and Salford City Reds in the Super League. He played as either a centre or on the wing.
